name: UniMart Sprint 2 — Support Ticket Router
description: US-06: Automatically routes incoming support tickets to the correct vertical resolution flow and saves them to Supabase.

parameters.functionCode:
const t = $node['🔀 Route & Enrich Ticket'].json;
return [{ json: { response: { ticket_created: true, vertical: t.vertical, issue_type: t.issue_type, sla_hours: t.sla_hours, resolution_flow: t.resolution_flow, ai_suggested_response: t.ai_suggested_response, priority: t.sla_hours <= 4 ? 'URGENT' : 'STANDARD', message: `Ticket created. Routed to ${t.resolution_flow}. SLA: ${t.sla_hours}h.` } } }];

_meta.expected_result: Routes to food_delivery_dispute_flow, SLA 4h, marked URGENT
